data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a reissue flow for legitimate customer support cases, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence or API interaction provided that confirms the implementation or validation of this reissue flow. The absence of such evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result of confirming requirement coverage or capturing a gap was not achieved.
gaps: No evidence of the reissue flow for legitimate customer support cases being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
